# Test pretty-printing JSON scanner functionality
#
# This test verifies that mcpspy correctly formats JSON with indentation

# Pretty printing test
cat input.json | mcpspy -f output.log -v -pretty

# Verify that the JSON is pretty-printed with proper indentation
cat output.log
stdout '  "method": "initialize"'
stdout '    "name": "test-client"'
stdout '  "method": "tools/list"'
stdout '  "method": "tools/call"'
stdout '    "key": "value"'

# Test files to be used
-- input.json --
{"method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "clientInfo": {"name": "test-client", "version": "1.0.0"}, "capabilities": {}}}
{"method": "tools/list", "params": {}}
{"method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "TestTool", "arguments": {"key": "value"}}}
